contract.rationale: Evidence snapshots materialize FHIR DocumentReference rows without transferring ownership away from the frozen snapshot chain.

identifierPolicy.label: Snapshot hash document key
identifierPolicy.description: DocumentReference identifiers are tied to the frozen evidence snapshot hash and artifact hash set.
identifierPolicy.versionRule: New snapshot hash emits a new DocumentReference version and supersedes prior set membership.

cardinalityPolicy.label: Snapshot document fan-out
cardinalityPolicy.description: One EvidenceSnapshot may emit many DocumentReference rows but all belong to one representation set hash.

redactionPolicy.label: Reference-only artifacts
redactionPolicy.description: Payloads carry governed artifact refs, checksums, and masked descriptors only; no binary bodies or transcript text.

companionArtifactPolicy.label: DocumentReference binary refs
companionArtifactPolicy.description: DocumentReference rows may reference Attachment object keys, checksums, and malware/quarantine posture but not inline payload bodies.

replayPolicy.label: Stable docs by snapshot hash
replayPolicy.description: EvidenceSnapshot replay reproduces the same DocumentReference collection while snapshot hash inputs are unchanged.

supersessionPolicy.label: Snapshot replacement supersedes documents
supersessionPolicy.description: Superseding an EvidenceSnapshot invalidates the older DocumentReference membership while preserving immutable prior rows.

callbackCorrelationPolicy.label: No callback correlation
callbackCorrelationPolicy.description: Clinical persistence-only contracts do not participate in partner callback correlation.
